title: Extra Sins
description: This is an addition to the wonderful «Sons Of Sins» mod by furti-two, which brings more compatibility with other mods
body:
Extra Sins is addon to the [Sons Of Sins](https://modrinth.com/mod/sons-of-sins) mod by [furti-two](https://modrinth.com/user/furti-two). 

Highly recommended:
- [Sons Of Sins](https://modrinth.com/mod/sons-of-sins)
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
- [Simply More](https://modrinth.com/mod/simplymore) 


Recommended:
- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
- [Simply More](https://modrinth.com/mod/simplymore) 
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)


The mod adds compatibility with other mods. List of currently supported mods:
- **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)**
  (Added Soul Steel Knife, Osseous Knife, Sinful Knife, Ether Ash Coal, Ether Ash Coal Block, Ethereal Ash Brick Stove, Soul Steel Stove, chunks of usual organs, fried versions of chunks and usual organs)
- **[Dynamic Lights](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-lights)** (Now, many objects have the ability to be a light source in your hand)
- **[Diet](https://modrinth.com/mod/diet)** (The organs and their fried versions have become a source of proteins (or sugars))
- **[JEED](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed)** (Added descriptions of effects from Sons of Sins mod and Extra Sins mod)
- **[Legendary Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-monsters)** (Added weapons created from drops from mobs from this mod. Also, with the help of weapons from this mod, in the recipe of which there is a bone, you can get ether ashes)
- **[Warriors of Past Epoch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/warriors-of-past-epoch)** (Added new weapons in compatibility with this mod. Also, using a saw from this mod, you can get organs)
- **[Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)** and **[Simply More](https://modrinth.com/mod/simplymore)**
  (Added new weapons, such as Soul Steel Cleaver, Long Cleaver, etc. You will see the rest of the weapons in the game)
- **[Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)**
  (Each weapon has a combat animation)
- **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)**
  (Now Ether Ash Coal and Blaze's heart are special fuels for blaze burners. Also added Soul Steel recipe for mixing. Also added a recipe for creating blood, Soul Steel Sheet, Soul Steel Nugget, Ether Tube, Polished Crystallized Ether)
- **[Malum](https://modrinth.com/mod/malum)** 
  (Now all weapons made of Soul Steel, bones, and also Sinful weapons are soul hunter weapons for the extraction of arcane spirits)
- **[Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)**
  (Added a recipe for creating blood)
- **[Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)**
  (Added new type of tools and weapons: Sculk Osseous)
- **[Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers)**
  (You can get human blood from the guards)
- **[Unusual Prehistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusual-prehistory-forge)**
  (Some dinosaurs can be used to obtain special blood)
- **[Biomancy](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomancy)**
  (Added recipes of decomposing for items from Sons Of Sins)

The content will be supplemented, errors will be corrected!

Planned mod compatibility:
- Farmer's Delight
- Simply Swords
- Create
- Create: Enchantment Industry
- Galosphere
- Biomancy
- Mystical Agriculture
- Unusual Prehistory
- Mekanism
- AE2
- Apotheosis
- Gobber
- Forbidden and Arcanus
- The Undergarden
- The Aether
- Born In Chaos
- Legendary Monsters
- Alex's Caves
- Alex's Mobs
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- Mowzie's Mobs
- Deeper and Darker
- Fungal Infection:Spore
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
- Ad Astra
- Caverns & Chasms

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-sina)
